articles.title: Pokémon Card Sales Are Surging on Crypto Platforms—Just Don't Call It Gambling
articles.description: Tokenized Pokémon card sales have skyrocketed over the past year, fueled by a wave of speculation and so-called gacha machines.

articles.title: Wall Street and crypto are crashing into each other as tokenized treasury markets hit $14.6 billion
articles.description: Not all crypto exchange executives agree, but the data does not lie: centralized exchange trading volumes dropped more than 11% to $4.61 trillion, their lowest since late 2024.

articles.title: Humanity Protocol’s $36M hack tied to suspected North Korean hackers: Quantstamp
articles.description: A fake Bithumb email used in the $36 million Humanity Protocol hack points to the involvement of North Korean threat actors, according to Quantstamp.

articles.title: Bitcoin nears $65K as Trump says Hormuz will 'open to all' in Sunday Iran peace deal
articles.description: Bitcoin stayed near local highs on a new US-Iran peace deal pledge as analysis saw conditions favoring a sustained BTC price rebound.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Trump says Iran peace deal to be signed Sunday, contradicting Tehran
articles.description: Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe said a peace deal, which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, would likely send liquidity back to risk-on assets such as cryptocurrencies.

articles.title: Amazon warning triggered US crackdown on Anthropic AI models: Reports
articles.description: Calls from Amazon CEO Andy Jassy and other tech firms prompted the Trump administration to suspend foreign access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models on Friday.

articles.title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Pull Claude Fable, Mythos AI Models
articles.description: Anthropic pushed back against what it described as an overreach, saying the vulnerability cited is already widespread across the industry.

articles.title: Crypto’s next billion-dollar hacker may move at superhuman speed

articles.title: Here's what SpaceX's IPO means for its $1.3 billion bitcoin reserve
articles.description: The largest company on public markets now holds bitcoin as a treasury reserve, not as a business model. Its first earnings cycles will test which version of corporate crypto survives a bear market.

articles.description: O’Connor argues that crypto’s clearest success story has scaled as money but not as capital.

articles.description: Google alleges a Chinese network weaponized its Gemini AI to create phishing sites that stole millions of credit card numbers and targeted crypto investors.

articles.title: Wall Street is moving past crypto pilots and deeper into Ethereum, says Etherealize founder
articles.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, Etherealize cofounder Vivek Raman said Ethereum is currently in a transitional phase where the infrastructure has largely been built, but the scale of adoption has yet to be fully reflected in ETH itself.

articles.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox

articles.title: Perpetual futures could become crypto's next ETF moment

articles.title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says

articles.title: AI Agent Rekts Dev on Bogus Scan, Leaves Them Begging for Crypto Donations
